---
title: "Diana Latham"
---

## Diana Latham

**Dates:** (b 1824/5)

### Description

daughter of the Rev. Henry Latham

### Biography

She was daughter of Latham and his first wife Maria Halliwell, and stepsister of Margaret Roberts.
 [1851, 1871, 1881 census; George Ormerod, <i>Parentalia</i> (1851)] 
Diana Latham contributed some reminiscences to the autobiography of her cousin the naturalist Eleanor Ormerod (1828-1901: <i>Eleanor Ormerod, LL.D., economic entomologist: Autobiography and correspondence</i>edited by Robert Wallace (London : John Murray, 1904)

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 1 [1899?]
- Letter from June 1st 1868

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
